metadata.description: The base name to use for the resources that will be provisioned.
The client ID of the user bot Azure AD app, e.g., 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000.
The client secret of the user bot Azure AD app.
The client ID of the author bot Azure AD app, e.g., 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000.
The client secret of the author bot Azure AD app.
The client ID of the Microsoft Graph Azure AD app, e.g., 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000.
The client secret of the Microsoft Graph Azure AD app.
Semicolon-delimited list of the user principal names (UPNs) allowed to send messages.
If proactive app installation should be enabled.
User app external ID.
Default culture.
Comma-delimited list of the supported cultures.
How the app will be hosted on a domain that is not *.azurewebsites.net. Azure Front Door is an easy option that the template can set up automatically, but it comes with ongoing monthly costs.
The app (and bot) display name.

appDescription.defaultValue: Broadcast messages to multiple teams and people in one go

metadata.description: The app (and bot) description.
The link to the icon for the app. It must resolve to a PNG file.
The ID of the tenant to which the app will be deployed.
App Service Plan SKU. P0v3 = 1 GB RAM (~80 EUR/mo, dev/test). P1v3 = 8 GB RAM (~125 EUR/mo, production). Both support VNet integration and private endpoints.

Public IPv4 of the operator running this deployment. Used to allow management access through the storage/KeyVault firewalls and to the App Service SCM (Kudu) site. Auto-detected by deploy.ps1 if blank. Pass empty string to skip the IP allow rule.
Location for all resources.
Unix epoch (seconds) when Key Vault secrets created by this template should expire. Defaults to deployment-time + 2 years. Redeploying refreshes the expiry.
The URL to the GitHub repository to deploy.
The branch of the GitHub repository to deploy.
A GUID used to identify the role assignment. This is Default value.
A GUID used to identify the role assignment. This is Default value.
A GUID used to identify the role assignment. This is Default value.
A GUID used to identify the role assignment. This is Default value.
A GUID used to identify the role assignment. This is Default value.
A GUID used to identify the role assignment. This is Default value.
A GUID used to identify the role assignment. This is Default value.
A GUID used to identify the Storage Table Data Contributor role assignment for the web app.
A GUID used to identify the Storage Table Data Contributor role assignment for the prep function.
A GUID used to identify the Storage Table Data Contributor role assignment for the send function.
A GUID used to identify the Storage Table Data Contributor role assignment for the data function.
Enable Azure Blob Storage image upload
Azure Blob SAS Token duration
Enables targeting mode
Semicolon-delimited list of the master admins (UPNs) allowed to setup and configure targeting mode.

appDomain.value: [if(variables('useFrontDoor'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/afdEndpoints', variables('frontDoorName'), variables('frontDoorEndpointName')), '2024-02-01').hostName, concat('Please create a custom domain name for ', variables('botAppDomain'), ' and use that in the manifest'))]
